commonPatterns.name: basic-pagination
commonPatterns.description: Previous/next with numbered page links — use only for 5 pages or fewer

commonPatterns.name: toolbar-with-page-size
commonPatterns.description: Full pagination toolbar with rows-per-page selector, go-to input, and prev/next — use for datasets over 5 pages

commonPatterns.name: toolbar-fixed-page-size
commonPatterns.description: Pagination toolbar without rows-per-page — when page size is not configurable

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Pagination for step-by-step wizard navigation
antiPatterns.reason: Pagination is for browsing content pages, not sequential step progression
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a Stepper or custom step navigation

antiPatterns.scenario: Showing all page numbers for large datasets
antiPatterns.reason: Renders an unusably long row of links
antiPatterns.alternative: Use PaginationEllipsis to collapse ranges and show a window around the current page

antiPatterns.reason: Previous/next are the primary navigation affordance on mobile
antiPatterns.alternative: Always include previous and next controls

antiPatterns.scenario: Using numbered page links without a go-to input when total pages exceed 5
antiPatterns.reason: Numbered links with ellipsis become impractical for large page counts — users cannot jump efficiently
antiPatterns.alternative: Use the data table pagination pattern: Previous/Next buttons, 'Page X of Y' indicator, and a go-to page input. Add rows-per-page selector when page size is configurable.

slots.PaginationToolbar: Self-contained pagination bar with page indicator, go-to input, and prev/next buttons. Optional rows-per-page and total rows display.
slots.PaginationContent: Flex container for all pagination items (composable variant)
slots.PaginationItem: Wrapper li for each page link or control (composable variant)
slots.PaginationLink: Individual page number link (uses buttonVariants, composable variant)
slots.PaginationPrevious: Previous page navigation with chevron icon (composable variant)
slots.PaginationNext: Next page navigation with chevron icon (composable variant)

interactions.click: Navigates to the target page via href
interactions.hover: PaginationLink shows ghost/outline hover styles from buttonVariants

responsive.mobile: Previous/Next labels hidden below sm breakpoint; icons remain visible
responsive.desktop: Full text labels for previous/next shown

accessibility.screenReader: Active page announced via aria-current="page"; ellipsis has sr-only "More pages" text

rules: Use PaginationEllipsis when total pages exceed a reasonable window (5-7 visible)
Mark the current page with isActive on PaginationLink
PaginationLink renders anchor tags — pass href for navigation
When total pages exceed 5, use the data table pattern (Previous/Next buttons, page indicator, go-to input) instead of numbered page links

aiHints.context: Two variants: PaginationToolbar (self-contained, use for >5 pages) and composable Pagination primitives (use for ≤5 pages). PaginationToolbar includes page indicator, go-to input, prev/next buttons, and optional rows-per-page selector. DataTable uses PaginationToolbar internally. All controls use size sm.
